reviews.review_description: This game still needs a lot of work but overall, it has great potential.    Problems: Overall, the physics need work.  1) You try to grab the barrel with your left hand and sometimes it automatically grabs the magazine on the gun and sometimes if you're concentrating on the suspect, you don't notice you pulled the mag out when you go to fire. 2) The tutorial is rather simple instructions about firing guns, but no information about anything else. One shot at a rather large target and they automatically think you're a pro and move on. 3) The first couple guns worked okay with the scope. The last two had problems when you line up a shot and about to pull the trigger, the entire gun/scope moved towards your eyes and then away really fast. It's hard to keep the guns still long enough to take a shot. This isn't me or my hands moving that causes it, it is the game has problems with where the gun/stock is as compared to your body. I was able to buy all the guns, upgrade them and still have over a million dollars in the bank in one play of the game. 4) Needs harder challenges. Allow the subject to shoot back if you miss. Every time you miss, the bounty should go down. If you hit a civilian, the bounty is voided. It seems only head shots kill anyone, and it takes three or four shots to the body to put them down. If you hit them anywhere but the head, they limp away. seems silly that a shot to the chest causes them to limp. Why is the video the same for this game as it is for Sniper Elite VR and the Sniper Elite VR Winter Warrior the exact same?

This VR sniper game surprised me with its evolving story and variety of missions. It's not just about aiming and shooting—there’s a nice sense of progression as the plot unfolds. Some missions require patience and thinking ahead, which makes it more rewarding.

I genuinely enjoyed the experience and kept wishing there were more levels or even a sequel. It feels like a solid foundation that could grow into something even bigger with new gameplay elements. If you're into slow-paced, thoughtful shooting games, definitely worth checking out.
The sniper sucks and it doesn't even work with two hands
Whenever I  play a level to get a new sniper sometimes it does it one I did before
